productDisplayName: Wrangler Women Floral Stud Navy Blue T-shirt
description: Composition Navy blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with floral graphic print and crystal embellishments on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations With a clean cut and a neat finish that offers a flattering silhouette, this T-shirt from wrangler offers a casual yet stylish vibe. The soft cotton fabric together with the pretty floral graphic print and crystal embellishments, make it a good buy. Pair it with jeans, shorts or a skirt and sporty footwear for absolute style. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
